arts.ttl: Angry ex-Leeds United coach grabs player by the neck and shakes him after red card
arts.sum: Pep Clotet felt his side showed commitment and fight despite being a man down, but ultimately paid the price for a lack of game management. The Spanish manager, recently appointed by Triestina who are currently languishing at the bottom of Italy's third tier with only one win in their first 14 games of the season, saw his side lose 1-0 at home to Giana Erminio on Friday night.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for QPR as Daniel Farke hits back at Elland Road critics
arts.sum: By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen. Leeds United squad vs QPR: Meslier, Darlow, Cairns, Byram, Bogle, Struijk, Rodon, Struijk, Firpo, Schmidt, James, Gnonto, Rothwell, Tanaka, Guilavogui, Crew, Solomon, Aaronson, Piroe, Joseph, Bamford, Gelhardt.

arts.ttl: QPR star that tore Leeds United’s 23/24 promotion hopes to shreds won’t play today
arts.sum: Leeds United host QPR tomorrow for the first time since the R’s inflicted a damning 4-0 loss on the Whites in the promotion run-in back in April. Ilias Chair ruled out of Leeds United v QPR with injury

arts.ttl: Is Leeds United vs QPR on TV? Kick-off time, live stream details and how to follow
arts.sum: If you join our WhatsApp community, we will send links to the blog and post-match analysis straight to your phone. No. Cardiff City vs Blackburn Rovers is the headline Championship fixture to be screened on the Sky Sports Football channel, with coverage getting underway at 12:30pm.

arts.ttl: Italy U21 squad announced: Roma, Chelsea and Leeds talents included
arts.sum: Carlo Nunziata has named a 27-player squad for Italy U21s’ upcoming matches against France and...

arts.ttl: Ref named for Leeds v QPR - Klich and Greenwood aren’t on good terms - LeedsAllOver
arts.sum: Donohue took charge of four Leeds fixtures last season, with the Whites recording two wins, while drawing one and losing one. Leeds United’s next Championship opponents are Marti Cifuentes’ QPR side sitting 23rd in the table, and the Whites will be seeking revenge for last season.

David McIntyre is joined by Kevin Gallen for another West London Sport QPR podcast. They discuss the 4-1 defeat against Middlesbrough, ongoing concerns about the club’s recruitment and what could be done to turn things around. The post ‘There’s a lot wrong at QPR’ appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Leeds United set to lose key transfer piece ahead of January window with no replacement planned
arts.sum: Technical director Gretar Steinsson is already transitioning to a new role with United’s ownership group, 49ers Enterprises. Under Kinnear, Leeds have Hammond continuing in a consultancy role, Farke, Adam Underwood (head of football operations) and Hannah Cox (head of football administration).

arts.ttl: Leeds United ace getting ‘unfair rap’ from some fans despite off-field moment spotted
arts.sum: Leeds United striker Patrick Bamford isn’t having a great time of it at the moment with injuries and minutes in games, but it doesn’t stop him having a key role off the pitch. You can’t tell me he doesn’t care about Leeds United winning games.

arts.ttl: Under-pressure QPR boss Marti Cifuentes has already given glowing Leeds United verdict
arts.sum: “The situation where we are and playing away against Leeds, it is not easy but I am a big believer as well that we can win this game, that we can go for it," Cifuentes told the club's website. "We need to move on quick (from Middlesbrough), learn from this and make sure we prepare for a very challenging game against Leeds because they are one of the top teams in the league.”
